hooks.command: bash -c 'set -e; INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" >> /tmp/pharos-worktree-create.log; CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .cwd); NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .name); WORKTREE_PATH="$CWD/.claude/worktrees/$NAME"; BRANCH_NAME="agent/$NAME"; mkdir -p "$CWD/.claude/worktrees"; git -C "$CWD" worktree add -B "$BRANCH_NAME" "$WORKTREE_PATH" main >&2; echo "$WORKTREE_PATH"'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" >> /tmp/pharos-worktree-remove.log; CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .cwd); NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .name); WORKTREE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r "(.worktree_path // \"$CWD/.claude/worktrees/$NAME\")"); BRANCH_NAME="agent/$NAME"; git -C "$CWD" worktree remove --force "$WORKTREE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; git -C "$CWD" branch -D "$BRANCH_NAME" 2>/dev/null || true'
